no: Turnabout During the final battle, you can revive certain companions to aid you in your fight if they aren’t already alive in your group: Install Turnabout after Ascension and Khalid for BG2. WARNING: Ships very large BCS scripts (d0t#alia.bcs 112KB, d0t#dyna.bcs 333KB) that cannot survive WeiDU’s BCS decompile/recompile round-trip. Mods that use SFO’s ALTER_SCRIPT_BLOCK on all BCS files (Talents of Faerun subraces cn:20000, barbarian cn:40150) will crash unless alter_script.tph is patched with PATCH_TRY around DECOMPILE_BCS_TO_BAF.

conflicts.reason: Turnabout's large BCS scripts (d0t#alia.bcs 112KB, d0t#dyna.bcs 333KB) cannot survive WeiDU's BCS decompile/recompile round-trip. ToF cn:20000 (subraces) and cn:40150 (barbarian class) use SFO's ALTER_SCRIPT_BLOCK which calls DECOMPILE_BCS_TO_BAF without PATCH_TRY — crashes on these scripts. FIX: Patch alter_script.tph in all SFO copies (infinity-mod-runner patch #1). Without patch, ToF cn:20000 and cn:40150 fail.
conflicts.theirComps: #20000 Subraces #40150 Make Barbarian into a Class #40160 Wizard Slayer for Barbarians

sum: Lets you play as the villain in ToB's final act. After the normal ending, switch perspectives for an alternate climax with new tactical challenges.

co.no: Alternative ending with reversed roles in the final battle.
